description.ko: 폭우와 네온 홀로그램이 디지털 로맨스의 활기차고 반사적인 분위기를 조성하는 낭만적인 테크 누아르 도시 풍경입니다.
description.en: A romanticized tech-noir cityscape where heavy rain and neon holograms create a vibrant, reflective atmosphere of digital romance.

prompt: A cinematic vertical view of NEON-V, titled 'The Electric Monsoon Veranda.' Towering #1A0033 indigo skyscrapers are draped in massive 3D holograms of geometric petals pulsing in #FF00FF magenta and #00FFFF cyan. Heavy rain creates vibrant, distorted reflections on wet metallic walkways. Flying maglev vehicles leave long #FF6B35 orange light trails cutting through thick volumetric fog. Hyper-detailed tech-noir textures, ray-traced reflections, 8k resolution, capturing a moody and romantic futuristic urban atmosphere.
